per_question.answer_preview: Attention base class (attention.py:238) with SelfAttention (1238), CrossAttention (1610). DotProductAttention (dot_product_attention.py:26). Backends: TEDotProductAttention, local PyTorch, Kitchen, Mu

per_question.answer_preview: ProcessGroupCollection (process_groups_config.py:27) manages TP, DP, PP, CP, EP process groups for distributed training communication.

per_question.answer_preview: MTP in multi_token_prediction.py: MultiTokenPredictionBlock (1009), MultiTokenPredictionLayer (589), configured via mtp_num_layers, mtp_loss_scaling_factor.

per_question.answer_preview: Mamba SSM in megatron/core/ssm/: MambaModel, MambaStack (mamba_block.py:47), MambaLayer (mamba_layer.py:51), MambaMixer (mamba_mixer.py:113), MambaContextParallel.

per_question.answer_preview: Float16Module (module.py:412) wraps MegatronModule for FP16/BF16 mixed precision training, handling input conversion and gradient scaling.

per_question.answer_preview: PipelineParallelLayerLayout (pipeline_parallel_layer_layout.py:15) configures layer assignment via string ('Et*3|(tt|)*29,m|L') or list format.

per_question.answer_preview: cuda_graphs.py: CudaGraphManager (1368), _CudaGraphRunner (668), TECudaGraphHelper (1668), CudaGraphScope enum, FullCudaGraphWrapper (full_cuda_graph.py:94).

per_question.answer_preview: megatron/core/models/multimodal/ with llava_spec.py, vision/ with vit_layer_specs.py, MultimodalRotaryEmbedding, pretrain_vlm.py for VLM training.

per_question.expected_preview: LanguageModule (in megatron/core/models/common/language_module/language_module.py) is the base class
per_question.answer_preview: LanguageModule (language_module.py:35) extends MegatronModule as base for GPTModel, MambaModel, providing ProcessGroupCollection, embedding handling.

per_question.expected_preview: Quantization is in megatron/core/quantization/. RecipeConfig specifies quantization configurations.
per_question.answer_preview: megatron/core/quantization/: quant_config.py, utils.py, fp8_utils.py, fp4_utils.py. Fp8Recipe/Fp4Recipe enums. post_training/modelopt/ for ModelOpt.

per_question.expected_preview: Models in megatron/core/models/: 'gpt' (GPTModel for decoder-only LLMs), 'T5' (encoder-decoder T5),
per_question.answer_preview: gpt/, bert/, T5/, mamba/, multimodal/, vision/, retro/, huggingface/, mimo/, common/, backends.py.

per_question.expected_preview: Tokenizers are in megatron/core/tokenizers/ and megatron/training/tokenizer/. MegatronTokenizerBase
per_question.answer_preview: megatron/core/tokenizers/: MegatronTokenizerText, MambaTokenizer, build_tokenizer. IndexedDataset uses _INDEX_HEADER b'MMIDIDX\x00\x00'.

per_question.expected_preview: Extensions are in megatron/core/extensions/. The main extension is for Transformer Engine integratio
per_question.answer_preview: megatron/core/extensions/: transformer_engine.py (TEDotProductAttention, TELayerNormColumnParallelLinear:711), kitchen.py, transformer_engine_spec_provider.py.

per_question.expected_preview: Resharding is in megatron/core/resharding/. It handles converting checkpoints between different para
per_question.answer_preview: megatron/core/resharding/: planner.py, execution.py, utils.py, refit.py, copy_services/ for changing parallelism configurations.

per_question.expected_preview: Tensor parallel layers use reduce_from_tensor_model_parallel_region during backward to all-reduce gr
per_question.answer_preview: TP layers use all-reduce via custom autograd functions. ColumnParallelLinear all-reduces when gather_output=False, RowParallelLinear when input_is_parallel=True.

per_question.expected_preview: DDP (megatron/core/distributed/distributed_data_parallel.py) stores gradients in contiguous ParamAnd
per_question.answer_preview: DDP (distributed_data_parallel.py:22) registers gradient hooks for all-reduce, works with DistributedOptimizer for ZeRO sharding.

per_question.expected_preview: Pipeline schedules in megatron/core/pipeline_parallel/schedules.py coordinate execution. get_forward
per_question.answer_preview: get_forward_backward_func (schedules.py:45) returns schedule (1F1B, interleaved). P2PCommunicator handles tensor exchange.

per_question.expected_preview: The Router (router.py) computes routing logits via gating() and selects top-k experts via routing().
per_question.answer_preview: Router computes scores (TopKRouter:131), dispatcher handles data movement (AllGather:208, AlltoAll:348, Flex:1320).

per_question.expected_preview: dist_checkpointing uses ShardedTensor to describe each rank's tensor slice. During save, each rank w
per_question.answer_preview: dist_checkpointing/ uses ShardedStateDict, each rank saves local shards, barrier sync, index files track shards.

per_question.expected_preview: Sequence parallelism splits activations along the sequence dimension across TP ranks. It's enabled v
per_question.answer_preview: SP distributes sequence across TP group. Uses reduce-scatter/all-gather instead of all-reduce. gather_from_sequence_parallel_region handles transitions.

per_question.expected_preview: Context parallelism splits the input sequence across CP ranks (config.context_parallel_size). For at
per_question.answer_preview: CP splits sequence across ranks (context_parallel_size:45). Ring attention, hierarchical CP, TEDotProductAttention required. DotProductAttention asserts CP not supported.

per_question.expected_preview: OptimizerParamScheduler (megatron/core/optimizer_param_scheduler.py) computes learning rate and othe
per_question.answer_preview: optimizer_param_scheduler.py manages LR schedules (warmup, decay), updates param groups each step.

per_question.expected_preview: Virtual PP splits a model into multiple chunks on each PP rank. Each chunk is a separate model insta
per_question.answer_preview: VPP (virtual_pipeline_model_parallel_size:31) splits model into chunks per rank. Interleaved 1F1B reduces bubble.

per_question.expected_preview: RerunStateMachine (megatron/core/rerun_state_machine.py) tracks training state for fault tolerance.
per_question.answer_preview: rerun_state_machine.py tracks state, detects NaN/Inf, triggers rollback, coordinates across ranks.

per_question.expected_preview: TransformerLayer follows a standard architecture: input -> LayerNorm -> SelfAttention -> residual ->
per_question.answer_preview: Residual connections: Input->LayerNorm->Attention->ResidualAdd, then LayerNorm->MLP->ResidualAdd.

per_question.expected_preview: DistributedOptimizer (megatron/core/optimizer/distrib_optimizer.py) shards optimizer state and model
per_question.answer_preview: DistributedOptimizer (distrib_optimizer.py:97) implements ZeRO sharding: reduce-scatter gradients, local update, all-gather params.

per_question.expected_preview: IndexedDataset (megatron/core/datasets/indexed_dataset.py) memory-maps preprocessed .bin and .idx fi
per_question.answer_preview: IndexedDataset memory-maps binary data with _INDEX_HEADER. GPTDataset loads via iterator, BlendedDataset combines sources.

per_question.expected_preview: FP8 training uses delayed scaling with amax history. TE tracks amax (max absolute value) across forw
per_question.answer_preview: fp8_utils.py manages scales and amax history. Delayed scaling computes scale=max_amax/fp8_max. TE handles FP8 GEMM.

per_question.expected_preview: parallel_state (megatron/core/parallel_state.py) maintains global state for all process groups via m
per_question.answer_preview: parallel_state.py (~93KB) initializes/stores TP,PP,DP,CP,EP groups. Accessors: get_tensor_model_parallel_group(), etc.

per_question.expected_preview: Gradient accumulation fusion fuses weight gradient computation with GEMM operations. It requires the
per_question.answer_preview: gradient_accumulation_fusion config enables fused gradient accumulation in GEMM kernels, all-reduce once per accumulation.

per_question.expected_preview: MoE layers can have both routed experts and shared experts (config.moe_shared_expert_intermediate_si
per_question.answer_preview: Shared expert output for all tokens + weighted routed expert outputs combined. num_shared_experts in MoEConfig.

per_question.expected_preview: FSDP support is in megatron/core/distributed/fsdp/. TorchFullyShardedDataParallel wraps PyTorch FSDP
per_question.answer_preview: megatron/core/distributed/fsdp/: DistributedDataParallelConfig:8, PyTorch FSDP for parameter sharding alongside TP.

per_question.expected_preview: P2PCommunicator (megatron/core/pipeline_parallel/p2p_communication.py) manages send/recv operations
per_question.answer_preview: P2PCommunicator (p2p_communication.py) uses isend/irecv for async communication, batched P2P for efficiency.

per_question.expected_preview: Checkpoint conversion is in tools/checkpoint/. convert.py orchestrates conversion between formats. L
per_question.answer_preview: resharding/ for topology changes, dist_checkpointing for format. planner.py computes plan, execution.py applies.

per_question.expected_preview: Hybrid CP (config.hybrid_context_parallel) handles variable-length sequences by redistributing sampl
per_question.answer_preview: hybrid_context_parallel:65 with max_seqlen_per_dp_cp_rank:56 distributes tokens to equalize work.

per_question.expected_preview: MoE auxiliary losses (load balancing, z-loss) are computed in router.py via save_to_aux_losses_track
per_question.answer_preview: MoEAuxLossAutoScaler (moe_utils.py:189) scales and accumulates aux losses added to main loss.

per_question.expected_preview: Timers (megatron/core/timers.py) provides hierarchical timing. Timer objects measure elapsed time wi
per_question.answer_preview: timers.py (~17KB): Timers class with CUDA events for accurate GPU timing, nested regions, configurable logging.

per_question.expected_preview: Weight initialization uses get_cuda_rng_tracker (tensor_parallel/random.py) to ensure consistent ran
per_question.answer_preview: Shared random seed via init_method_normal (utils.py), parameters initialized consistently then sliced by TP rank.

per_question.expected_preview: CPU offloading is configured via config.cpu_offloading. When True, activations are asynchronously of
per_question.answer_preview: fine_grained_activation_offload.py: offload()/reload() API, overlaps transfer with computation.

per_question.expected_preview: EnergyMonitor (megatron/core/energy_monitor.py) tracks GPU power consumption using NVML. It records
per_question.answer_preview: energy_monitor.py (~2.6KB) uses NVML to query GPU power, integrates over time for energy.

per_question.expected_preview: GlobalMemoryBuffer (megatron/core/utils.py, accessed via parallel_state.get_global_memory_buffer) pr
per_question.answer_preview: parallel_state.py GlobalMemoryBuffer pre-allocates reusable buffers for all-reduce/all-gather.

per_question.expected_preview: Data flow: 1) preprocess_data.py tokenizes raw text into .bin/.idx files (IndexedDataset format). 2)
per_question.answer_preview: Raw text -> tokenizer -> IndexedDataset binary -> GPTDataset -> DataLoader -> model embeddings.

per_question.expected_preview: ColumnParallelLinear splits the weight matrix along the output dimension (columns) - each TP rank ha
per_question.answer_preview: ColumnParallelLinear splits output dim [hidden,out/TP], RowParallelLinear splits input dim [in/TP,hidden].

per_question.expected_preview: During inference, BaseInferenceContext (megatron/core/inference/contexts/) manages KV cache. On firs
per_question.answer_preview: unified_memory.py manages KV cache, BaseInferenceContext stores state, cache indexed by position/layer.

per_question.expected_preview: In forward: Stage N computes activations and sends to stage N+1 via P2P send_forward. First stage ge
per_question.answer_preview: P2PCommunicator isend/irecv: forward sends activations, backward sends gradients in reverse.

per_question.expected_preview: Gradients flow: 1) Backward pass computes per-microbatch gradients. 2) DistributedDataParallel accum
per_question.answer_preview: Multiple microbatches accumulate .grad, DDP all-reduces across DP, DistributedOptimizer reduce-scatters.

per_question.expected_preview: RotaryEmbedding computes freqs from position indices and inv_freq. apply_rotary_pos_emb (rope_utils.
per_question.answer_preview: RotaryEmbedding (rotary_pos_embedding.py:36) precomputes cos/sin, applies: q_rot = q*cos + rotate_half(q)*sin.

per_question.expected_preview: Flow: 1) Router computes logits = input @ gate_weight. 2) Top-k selection gets (probs, routing_map).
per_question.answer_preview: Router computes scores, selects top-k, dispatcher shuffles tokens, experts process, outputs combined with weights.

per_question.expected_preview: Activation checkpointing (recomputation) saves memory by not storing all intermediate activations. c
per_question.answer_preview: recompute_granularity controls checkpointing. Forward saves checkpoints, backward recomputes from them.

per_question.expected_preview: BlendedDataset (megatron/core/datasets/blended_dataset.py) combines multiple datasets with specified
per_question.answer_preview: BlendedDataset takes datasets and weights, randomly selects source based on weights during iteration.

per_question.expected_preview: With sequence parallelism, tensors have shape [seq_len/TP, batch, hidden] instead of [seq_len, batch
per_question.answer_preview: SP: [batch,seq/TP,hidden]. All-gather before attention, reduce-scatter after. ScatterTo/GatherFrom autograd functions.

per_question.expected_preview: PackedSeqParams (megatron/core/packed_seq_params.py) contains cu_seqlens (cumulative sequence length
per_question.answer_preview: PackedSeqParams (packed_seq_params.py) with cu_seqlens. FlashAttention natively supports packed format.

per_question.expected_preview: In pretrain_gpt.py loss_func: 1) output_tensor contains per-token losses. 2) loss_mask zeros out pad
per_question.answer_preview: Cross-entropy per token, masked, mean locally. TP: parallel output. PP: last stage. DP: all-reduce.

per_question.expected_preview: linear_qkv projects input to Q, K, V. With GQA (num_query_groups), Q has more heads than K/V. Output
per_question.answer_preview: SelfAttention (attention.py:1238) linear_qkv projects to 3*hidden, ColumnParallelLinear splits heads across TP.

per_question.expected_preview: With DistributedOptimizer: 1) Each rank owns a shard of parameters. 2) Gradients are reduce-scattere
per_question.answer_preview: DistributedOptimizer: reduce-scatter gradients, local Adam step on shard, all-gather updated params.

per_question.expected_preview: When share_embeddings_and_output_weights=True in GPTModel, the embedding weight is shared with the o
per_question.answer_preview: share_embeddings_and_output_weights=True reuses embedding matrix for output projection.

per_question.expected_preview: MambaMixer (mamba_mixer.py) implements selective state space: 1) Input goes through in_proj (expand
per_question.answer_preview: MambaMixer (mamba_mixer.py:113) implements selective scan SSM: h_t=A*h_{t-1}+B*x_t, y_t=C*h_t.

per_question.expected_preview: schedule_async_save (megatron/training/async_utils.py) queues checkpoint saves to a background threa
per_question.answer_preview: State dict to staging buffers, background thread writes to storage, training continues.

per_question.expected_preview: unified_memory.py in megatron/core/inference/ manages KV cache allocation. It pre-allocates a memory
per_question.answer_preview: unified_memory.py (~20KB) pre-allocates GPU pool, paged attention, block tables, memory sharing.

per_question.expected_preview: Flow: 1) arguments.py parses CLI args into Namespace. 2) core_transformer_config_from_args converts
per_question.answer_preview: Args -> ModelParallelConfig -> TransformerConfig -> GPTModel -> submodules. Validated in post_init.

per_question.expected_preview: tp_comm_overlap=True enables overlapping TP communication with compute. For AllGather->GEMM, the GEM
per_question.answer_preview: Async collectives, CUDA streams separate computation/communication. TE provides fused overlap.

per_question.expected_preview: AttnMaskType enum (transformer/enums.py) defines: causal (lower triangular), padding (mask padded to
per_question.answer_preview: Causal (autoregressive), padding, custom. FlashAttention causal flag. cu_seqlens for packed.

per_question.expected_preview: MLA (multi_latent_attention.py) compresses KV into lower-dimensional latent space for memory efficie
per_question.answer_preview: MultiLatentAttention (multi_latent_attention.py:83) compresses KV to lower dim, MLASelfAttention extends it.

per_question.expected_preview: fine_grained_activation_offload.py implements FineGrainedActivationOffloadingInterface. Instead of o
per_question.answer_preview: FineGrainedActivationOffloadingInterface offloads specific activations to CPU, reloads during backward.

per_question.expected_preview: When config.gated_linear_unit=True, MLP uses a gated structure. linear_fc1 outputs 2x the intermedia
per_question.answer_preview: GLU: hidden=up_proj(x), gate=gate_proj(x), output=down_proj(act(gate)*hidden). SwiGLU uses SiLU.

per_question.expected_preview: SFTDataset (megatron/training/datasets/sft_dataset.py) handles instruction/response format for fine-
per_question.answer_preview: SFT uses instruction-response format, loss only on response tokens, loss_mask distinguishes regions.

per_question.expected_preview: log_single_rank (megatron/core/utils.py via _rank_utils.py) ensures logs only appear on specified ra
per_question.answer_preview: config_logger.py, rank 0 logs to avoid duplicates. timers aggregated. TensorBoard/W&B on rank 0.

per_question.expected_preview: Configuration validation primarily happens in __post_init__ methods of dataclasses. TransformerConfi
per_question.answer_preview: Dataclass post_init validates: assertions, warnings for deprecated, enum validation, cross-field checks.

per_question.expected_preview: NaN/Inf detection is controlled by args.check_for_nan_in_loss_and_grad. In loss_func, rerun_state_ma
per_question.answer_preview: rerun_state_machine.py monitors loss. Loss scaler detects overflow. Rollback on detection.

per_question.expected_preview: dist_checkpointing uses CheckpointingException (core.py) for checkpoint-specific errors. ShardedTens
per_question.answer_preview: Barrier sync, timeout mechanisms, partial save detection, checkpoint validation, retry logic.

per_question.expected_preview: Optional dependencies use try/except import patterns with HAVE_* flags. E.g., HAVE_TE = True after s
per_question.answer_preview: Try/except imports, HAVE_* flags, is_te_min_version checks. Fallback to PyTorch implementations.

per_question.expected_preview: StragglerDetector (megatron/core/utils.py) tracks iteration times across ranks. It identifies ranks
per_question.answer_preview: README_STRAGGLER.md: monitors iteration time, compares to average, flags slow ranks.

per_question.expected_preview: config.deterministic_mode=True enables deterministic ops (may be slower). RNG state is tracked per T
per_question.answer_preview: Random seeds, torch.manual_seed, cudnn.deterministic, checkpoint includes RNG states.

per_question.expected_preview: nccl_allocator.py provides a custom memory allocator for NCCL operations. It pre-allocates memory po
per_question.answer_preview: nccl_allocator.py (~15KB) pre-allocates pools, reduces fragmentation, enables buffer reuse.

per_question.expected_preview: config_logger.py provides has_config_logger_enabled() and log_config_to_disk(). When enabled, it ser
per_question.answer_preview: config_logger.py: has_config_logger_enabled, log_config_to_disk saves config at model init.

per_question.expected_preview: ft_integration.py provides integration with NVIDIA Fault Tolerance library. nvidia_resiliency_ext pr
per_question.answer_preview: rerun_state_machine.py, checkpointing, signal handlers, barrier failure detection, MSC redundant storage.

per_question.expected_preview: experimental_fn decorator (megatron/core/utils.py) marks functions as experimental with a version ta
per_question.answer_preview: experimental_attention_variant/ contains unstable implementations like DSAttention (dsa.py:691).

per_question.expected_preview: update_pg_timeout (parallel_state.py) updates timeout for process groups. It synchronizes via barrie
per_question.answer_preview: Configurable timeout for collectives, P2P, barriers. Triggers error on timeout.

per_question.expected_preview: Deprecated features use warnings.warn with DeprecationWarning. Deprecated config fields document the
per_question.answer_preview: warnings module, deprecated fields with notes (moe_extended_tp:78), migration guides.

per_question.expected_preview: report_theoretical_memory (megatron/training/theoretical_memory_usage.py) estimates memory usage bas
per_question.answer_preview: Based on model config: params, optimizer states, activations, gradients. TP/PP/DP reduce per-GPU.

per_question.expected_preview: nvtx_range_push/pop (megatron/core/utils.py) wrap NVTX ranges when available (HAVE_NVTX). These crea
per_question.answer_preview: nvtx_range_push/pop (utils.py) marks regions, visible in Nsight Systems profiler.

per_question.expected_preview: dist_signal_handler.py provides signal handling for distributed training. It catches SIGTERM/SIGINT
per_question.answer_preview: SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers, broadcast termination, checkpoint before exit, cleanup.

per_question.expected_preview: MultiStorageClientFeature (megatron/core/msc_utils.py) provides abstraction for different storage sy
per_question.answer_preview: msc_utils.py, MSC_Integration.md: local, S3, GCS, Azure. Unified API, async, retry.

per_question.expected_preview: safe_globals.py uses register_safe_globals() for PyTorch 2.6+ to allow loading trusted objects in ch
per_question.answer_preview: safe_globals.py (~1KB) whitelist of safe classes for torch.load weights_only=True.

per_question.expected_preview: set_jit_fusion_options (megatron/training/initialize.py) configures PyTorch JIT for kernel fusion. I
per_question.answer_preview: jit.py controls JIT compilation. Fused kernels in fusions/. TE provides TE-specific fusions.

per_question.expected_preview: append_to_progress_log (megatron/training/utils.py) writes training progress to a file. It records i
per_question.answer_preview: Iteration count, loss, LR, throughput, timers, checkpoint status, gradient norm, memory.

per_question.expected_preview: Tensor parallel size must divide num_attention_heads evenly (so each TP rank gets whole heads). With
per_question.answer_preview: num_attention_heads % tensor_model_parallel_size == 0. num_query_groups divisible by TP for GQA.

per_question.expected_preview: With even PP, num_layers must divide by pipeline_model_parallel_size. Uneven PP allows specifying nu
per_question.answer_preview: num_layers divisible by PP. Embedding first stage, loss last. pipeline_model_parallel_layout for custom.

per_question.expected_preview: Sequence parallelism requires: 1) tensor_model_parallel_size > 1. 2) sequence_parallel = True in con
per_question.answer_preview: tensor_model_parallel_size > 1, sequence_parallel=True (ModelParallelConfig:39).

per_question.expected_preview: decoupled_lr in OptimizerConfig specifies separate LR for embedding/output layers. Parameters with i
per_question.answer_preview: Separate param groups for embeddings with LR multiplier applied by scheduler.

per_question.expected_preview: num_moe_experts must be divisible by expert_model_parallel_size. moe_router_topk must be <= num_moe_
per_question.answer_preview: num_experts >= 1, expert_model_parallel_size divides num_experts, top_k <= num_experts.

per_question.expected_preview: check_checkpoint_args (megatron/training/checkpointing.py) compares key arguments: num_layers, hidde
per_question.answer_preview: Schema version check, config comparison, shape verification, resharding if needed.

per_question.expected_preview: virtual_pipeline_model_parallel_size must be None or >= 1. When set, enables interleaved scheduling
per_question.answer_preview: VPP must divide num_layers evenly with PP. VPP > 1 enables interleaved scheduling.

per_question.expected_preview: FP16 requires loss scaling due to limited dynamic range. DynamicGradScaler starts at initial_loss_sc
per_question.answer_preview: FP16 requires dynamic loss scaling. BF16 larger exponent, typically no scaling needed.

per_question.expected_preview: defer_embedding_wgrad_compute requires: 1) pipeline_model_parallel_size > 1. 2) gradient_accumulatio
per_question.answer_preview: drain_embedding_wgrad_compute (utils.py) defers embedding gradient until after main backward.

per_question.expected_preview: batch_p2p_comm and overlap_p2p_comm are mutually exclusive. batch_p2p_comm=True uses batch_isend_ire
per_question.answer_preview: batch_p2p_comm groups multiple P2P ops for efficiency, all operations must be independent.

per_question.expected_preview: ffn_hidden_size defaults to 4*hidden_size if not set. With gated_linear_unit, the projection is to f
per_question.answer_preview: ffn_hidden_size default 4*hidden_size, ~2.67x for GLU. Must be divisible by TP.

per_question.expected_preview: num_microbatches_calculator.py computes microbatches from global_batch_size / (dp_size * micro_batch
per_question.answer_preview: global_batch_size / (micro_batch_size * data_parallel_size). Supports rampup schedule.

per_question.expected_preview: Context parallel (CP) requires: sequence_length divisible by context_parallel_size. Attention implem
per_question.answer_preview: CP requires TEDotProductAttention. DotProductAttention asserts CP not supported (line 59).

per_question.expected_preview: By default, weight decay is skipped for: 1) bias parameters (name ends with '.bias'), 2) parameters
per_question.answer_preview: No weight decay on bias and LayerNorm parameters via separate param groups.

per_question.expected_preview: window_size is a tuple (left, right) for sliding window attention. -1 means infinite (full attention
per_question.answer_preview: window_size <= sequence_length. Only supports FlashAttention in batch invariant mode (line 1958).

per_question.expected_preview: num_distributed_optimizer_instances > 1 creates multiple optimizer instances across DP ranks. Each i
per_question.answer_preview: ChainedOptimizer wraps multiple. LayerWiseDistributedOptimizer (layer_wise_optimizer.py:26) extends it.

per_question.expected_preview: FP8 training (config.fp8) requires Transformer Engine. Fp8Recipe enum specifies recipe (delayed scal
per_question.answer_preview: Requires TE with FP8, Hopper GPUs. Fp8Recipe enum configures format.

per_question.expected_preview: DType.optimal_dtype checks vocab_size: if < 65500, uses uint16 (2 bytes per token), else int32 (4 by
per_question.answer_preview: vocab <= 256: uint8, <= 65536: uint16, <= 2^31: int32, else int64.

per_question.expected_preview: Persistent layer norm kernel (APEX FastLayerNormFN) only supports specific hidden_sizes: [1024, 1536
per_question.answer_preview: FusedLayerNorm:30 requires APEX (ValueError if missing:105). TENorm when TE available.

per_question.expected_preview: check_for_spiky_loss compares current loss against max observed loss * SPIKY_LOSS_FACTOR (10x). If e
per_question.answer_preview: rerun_state_machine.py detects sudden large increases, can trigger rollback.

per_question.expected_preview: No, Megatron-LM does not use torch.cuda.amp.autocast directly for mixed precision. Instead, it uses
per_question.answer_preview: No, uses Float16Module wrapper (module.py:412) and manual precision conversion instead of AMP autocast.

per_question.expected_preview: No, Megatron-LM does not include a Kubernetes operator. It relies on external launchers like torchru
per_question.answer_preview: No, relies on external tools like torchrun, SLURM, or third-party solutions.

per_question.expected_preview: The codebase is primarily designed for NVIDIA GPUs with CUDA. While PyTorch itself supports ROCm, Me
per_question.answer_preview: Primarily NVIDIA GPUs with CUDA. AMD GPU support not primary focus due to NVIDIA-specific optimizations.

per_question.expected_preview: No, GPTDataset requires pre-tokenized data in indexed binary format (.bin/.idx files). Raw text must
per_question.answer_preview: No, uses pre-tokenized IndexedDataset binary format. Raw text must be tokenized offline.
